name: Platinum Segmentata
description: Notes Using your ability will change your skin to the Platinum Knight skin for 30 seconds, which will reset to the actual skin you have equipped after 30 seconds (with a 30 second cooldown after), or every time you change zones.
effects: Halloween Costume: On ability use, dress up as Platinum Knight for 60 seconds! Secret Power: On ability use, consume 1/4th of your candy-filled meter to activate a secret power! Pierce the Line: Gain +12 DEF for 60 seconds and throw 15 spears for 300-400 damage. Secret Power Cooldown: 180 seconds
